title: CT10.N03 completed discharge record — Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT10.N03, the decision node “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→” of tactic CT10 (Default refinement). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT10.N03. It must be exactly `CT10`, selecting Default refinement (refinement) as the tactic that owns the decision step “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→”. It must be exactly `CT10.N03` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT10.N03 within tactic CT10 (Default refinement). It must be exactly 3, matching the N03 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT10.N03. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the decision obligation “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT10.N03. The array must contain `S-Dich`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Dich` to occur in CT10.N03's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class for the obligation “Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT10.N03 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Dich (residualClass, alternatives, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Dich` evidence instance at CT10.N03. It must be exactly `S-Dich`, identifying the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class; the same instance must supply residualClass, alternatives, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
